raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I purchased airline tickets from supposedly XXXX  on my XXXX for {$4600.00}. When I found out later ( I called the airline to ask a question ) that there are no reservations in my name, I immediately called the merchant. There were XXXX busy rings and then the phone went dead. I called many times and the same thing happened. At that time I notified Citi Cards and started a dispute. Then we found out that it wasnt XXXX but rather XXXX. For over a year theyve opened and closed many disputes, tossing me from the dispute department to the fraud department, back and for and each time I got a letter, telling me the dispute was closed and a different reason was claimed. 
The police had opened an investigation and were unable to reach the merchant. I have the police report, letters and emails I had sent to Citi Cards and they have disregarded them all.
